shared_attributes.position: center of 128x128 screen, on perch at y=60
shared_attributes.key_features: crest, cheek patch, tail - 3 essential cockatiel traits

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Triggered when player pets Echo by tapping/clicking on Echo
context.usage_scenario: Plays once after petting interaction. Shows Echo's joy and affection. Lasts 5 seconds then returns to idle. Spawns 3 heart particles rising upward.

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel with raised crest, slightly swaying body
visual_specification.texture: Flat pixel art with hand-drawn organic edges, no gradients

animation.description: Frame 1-2: Crest raises up. Frame 3-4: Body sways left. Frame 5-6: Wings slightly spread (2-3px outward). Frame 7-8: Body sways right, returns to center. Continuous joyful motion.

visual_specification.details: Crest: fully raised, 6-7px tall, all feathers pointing upward. Eyes: wide open, may show sparkle (1px white dot). Wings: extend 2-3px outward from body in frames 5-6. Body sway: 2-3px horizontal movement. Cheek patch more prominent/vibrant.

relationships.shared_with: Same base body as all Echo states
relationships.differences_from: echo_idle: crest raised vs normal, body animated vs static, wings spread vs folded. echo_singing: similar crest but different body motion. Only state with wing spread.

explicit_negations: Wings do not flap (only slight spread)
No rainbow or sparkle effects on body
